articles.title: Did you hear it? Here’s what we know about a big boom heard around Mass.
articles.description:
"Bolide meteor created the thunderous sonic boom."

The post Did you hear it? Here’s what we know about a big boom heard around Mass. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Residents across Boston reported a loud boom on May 30, 2026.
The sound was caused by a bolide meteor entering the atmosphere.
Local authorities confirmed no damage or injuries resulted from the event.
